conformsTo: documented Claude Code Hook contract for >= 2.1.199 (claude-hook-contract.md)
note: These payload fixtures were authored to the documented 2.1.199+ field names, NOT captured from a live Claude Code run or interactive trust dialog. They are the current deterministic acceptance boundary for the Row-D wrappers. Raw current-stable payload capture, live workspace-trust loading, and platform sourcing of CLAUDE_ENV_FILE remain deferred manual-validation items (see claude-version-trust-risks.md) for Row F to document; if a captured payload differs, parser field names may change but fail-closed semantics must not weaken.
